segments.text: Good evening everyone and thank you for coming to the Soccer Club meeting.
segments.translation: 大家晚上好，感谢大家来参加足球俱乐部的会议。

segments.text: It's good to see so many parents and children here tonight, and I know you are looking forward to a great football season.
segments.translation: 今晚在这里能看到这么多家长和孩子真是太棒了，而且我知道你们也期待着精彩的足球季。

segments.text: Now I'd like to take a few minutes to tell you about some changes to the Soccer Club for the coming season.
segments.translation: 现在，我想用几分钟告诉你们一些有关足球俱乐部在即将到来的这一季的变化。

segments.text: Now, this season we'll be playing all our matches for both the junior and senior competitions at King's Park, instead of Royal Park, which was used last season.
segments.translation: 现在，这一赛季，我们所有的初级和高级组的比赛会在国王公园进行，而不是上一季使用的皇家公园。

segments.text: Now for meetings, we're going to use the clubhouse in King's Park, and the next meeting will be held in the clubhouse on the 2nd of July.
segments.translation: 关于会议，我们会用国王公园的俱乐部会所，下一个会议会在7月2日在俱乐部会所举办。

segments.text: As usual, we hope to begin the season with a picnic next Saturday at the clubhouse.
segments.translation: 和往常一样，我们希望在下周六在俱乐部会所以一次野餐开始我们这一赛季。

segments.text: Please try and come to the picnic as it's always good fun.
segments.translation: 请尽量来参加野餐，因为这个一直都很有意思。

segments.text: The last week of the season we usually have a dinner and presentation of prizes to the players, and more information about this will be given to you later in the season.
segments.translation: 本赛季最后一周我们通常会一起聚餐，并且向运动员颁奖，有关这个的更多消息会在后面告诉你们。

segments.text: This season we have more teams than ever.
segments.translation: 这一赛季，我们比原来任何时候的队伍都多。

segments.text: We hope to have ten teams, instead of five, in the junior competition and they will play on Saturday mornings, beginning at 8.30 a.m.
segments.translation: 我们希望在初级组的比赛中有10个队伍，而不是5各，他们会在周六早晨8.30开始比赛。

segments.text: Training sessions will be held in King's Park on Wednesday afternoons for the juniors and they will be wearing red shirts again this year.
segments.translation: 初级组的训练课会在周三下午在国王公园进行，他们今年会穿红色的队服。

segments.text: In the senior competition, there'll be four teams, the same as last year, and their games will be played on Saturday afternoons starting at 2.30, no sorry, it will be a 2 o'clock start, and the training session for seniors is planned for Sunday afternoons.
segments.translation: 在高级组，一共有4支队伍，和去年一样。他们的比赛会在周六下午2.30，哦抱歉，是2.00开始。高级组的训练课计划在周日下午。

segments.text: Now I'd like to introduce you to the new committee for the Soccer Club for this season.
segments.translation: 现在，我想向你们介绍这一赛季足球俱乐部的新的委员会。

segments.text: Firstly, let me welcome Robert Young, the new President, who will manage the meetings for the next two years.
segments.translation: 首先，让我们欢迎罗伯特杨，新的主席，他会在接下来的两年负责管理会议。

segments.text: Robert's son has been playing football with the club for over five years now, and many thanks to Robert for taking on the job of President.
segments.translation: 罗伯特的儿子已经在俱乐部踢了五年多的球了，非常感谢罗伯特承担了主席的工作。

segments.text: Next we have Gina Costello, she's the treasurer, and she will collect the fees from you for the season.
segments.translation: 下一个，我们有请吉娜科斯特洛，她是财务，她会从你们那里收取本赛季的费用。

segments.text: Please try and give Gina your fees as early as possible in the season, as the club needs the money to buy some new equipment.
segments.translation: 请尽快在本赛季给吉娜你们的费用，因为俱乐部需要用这笔钱购买新的装备。

segments.text: Then there's David West who has volunteered to be the club secretary, and one of the many jobs he will have is to send out newsletters to you regularly.
segments.translation: 然后，还有大卫韦斯特，他自愿作为俱乐部的秘书，他要做的很多工作之一是向你们定期发放通讯。

segments.text: If you have any information that may be useful, please let David know so that it can be included in these newsletters.
segments.translation: 如果你们有什么可能有用的信息，请尽快告知大卫，以便他可以把这些囊括到通讯中。

segments.text: Also I'd like to introduce you to Jason Dokic who is the Head Coach.
segments.translation: 我还要向你们介绍主教练杰森多契奇。

segments.text: For all the new members here tonight, this is the third year that Jason has been with us as Head Coach, and we are very lucky to have such an experienced coach and former player at our club.
segments.translation: 对于今晚新加入我们的成员来说，这是杰森第三年作我们的主教练了，我们很幸运我们俱乐部中能有这么一位经验丰富的教练和前运动员。

segments.text: He will continue to supervise the teams, at training sessions and on match days.
segments.translation: 他会继续在训练课和比赛日监管队伍。

segments.text: Now before we finish and have some refreshments, does anyone have any questions they'd like to ask the new committee?
segments.translation: 现在，在我们结束去吃些茶点之前，还有没有人有问题要问我们的新委员会？
